nodes.label: BoostResNet (paper story)
nodes.rationale: Huang/Ash/Langford/Schapire ICML 2018: residual blocks ARE boosting (telescoping sum, weak learners); the proof under the author's block concept — sequential cheap local training converges; caveat: weak-learning condition is on the LABEL so applies to GD checkpoints, not unsupervised SCFF.

nodes.label: Residual = boosting (telescoping sum)
nodes.rationale: Each block a weak corrector adding a term to a running sum via the skip; error decays exponentially with depth IF each block clears the weak-learning bar; the author's 'each block reduces loss then passes on' verbatim.
